content: {"vocabulary":[{"word":"heure","translation":"Stunde","pronunciation":"[yʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Il est huit heures.","exampleTranslation":"Es ist acht Uhr.","usageNote":""},{"word":"minute","translation":"Minute","pronunciation":"[miɲyt]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Cinq minutes, s'il vous plaît.","exampleTranslation":"Fünf Minuten, bitte.","usageNote":""},{"word":"jour","translation":"Tag","pronunciation":"[ʒuʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Un jour, je vais à l'école.","exampleTranslation":"Einen Tag gehe ich zur Schule.","usageNote":""},{"word":"semaine","translation":"Woche","pronunciation":"[səmɛn]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Une semaine a sept jours.","exampleTranslation":"Eine Woche hat sieben Tage.","usageNote":""},{"word":"lundi","translation":"Montag","pronunciation":"[lyndi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le lundi, je travaille.","exampleTranslation":"Am Montag arbeite ich.","usageNote":""},{"word":"mardi","translation":"Dienstag","pronunciation":"[marti]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Mardi, je mange à midi.","exampleTranslation":"Am Dienstag esse ich mittags.","usageNote":""},{"word":"mercredi","translation":"Mittwoch","pronunciation":"[mɛʁkʁi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Mercredi, je dors tard.","exampleTranslation":"Am Mittwoch schlafe ich spät.","usageNote":""},{"word":"jeudi","translation":"Donnerstag","pronunciation":"[ʒødɪ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le jeudi, j'ai le cours de français.","exampleTranslation":"Am Donnerstag habe ich den Französischunterricht.","usageNote":""},{"word":"vendredi","translation":"Freitag","pronunciation":"[vɑ̃dʁi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Vendredi, je vais au cinéma.","exampleTranslation":"Am Freitag gehe ich ins Kino.","usageNote":""},{"word":"samedi","translation":"Samstag","pronunciation":"[samdi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Samedi, je suis à la maison.","exampleTranslation":"Am Samstag bin ich zu Hause.","usageNote":""},{"word":"dimanche","translation":"Sonntag","pronunciation":"[dismɑ̃s]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Dimanche, je regarde la télévision.","exampleTranslation":"Am Sonntag schaue ich fern.","usageNote":""},{"word":"matin","translation":"Morgen","pronunciation":"[ma.tɛ̃]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Le matin, je bois du lait.","exampleTranslation":"Am Morgen trinke ich Milch.","usageNote":""},{"word":"après-midi","translation":"Nachmittag","pronunciation":"[apʁɛ.midi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Après-midi, je joue au foot.","exampleTranslation":"Nachmittags spiele ich Fußball.","usageNote":""},{"word":"soir","translation":"Abend","pronunciation":"[swaʁ]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"Soir, je mange avec ma famille.","exampleTranslation":"Am Abend esse ich mit meiner Familie.","usageNote":""},{"word":"nuit","translation":"Nacht","pronunciation":"[nɥi]","partOfSpeech":"noun","example":"La nuit, je dors.","exampleTranslation":"In der Nacht schlafe ich.","usageNote":""}]}
